name: Grilled Cheese Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Sliced, reduced-fat cheese (Jarisberg, Monterey Jack, Cheddar, or mozzarella)
3 Bell pepper rings, red, yellow, or green; paper-thin; seeds, stems and ribs removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin strip from one side of the pita.
2. Carefully open the pita to create a pocket for the filling.
3. Place one slice of cheese in the pita pocket.
4. Slide in the tomatoes; add the alfalfa sprouts and top with the pickle slices and pepper rings.
5. Add the remaining cheese slice.
6. Heat a medium (8-10") skillet over medium-high heat until hot enough to evaporate a drop of water upon contact.
7. Spray with a vegetable-oil cooking spray.
8. Add the sandwich; cook, covered, over medium-low heat, turning once, until browned on both sides, about 10 minutes.
